About

The Person Behind
the Architecture

Biography

I am an Executive IT Architect, Senior Software Development Manager, Thought Leader, and Developer Advocate at IBM, where I've driven technology strategy since 2015. I specialize in AI, Quantum Computing, Cloud Architecture, and Developer Experience, translating complex technical concepts into actionable enterprise strategies.

Today, I lead a globally distributed engineering organization as Sr Software Development Manager for Cloud Complex Workload Onboarding, overseeing IBM Cloud's MISP offering portfolio and AIOps capabilities. I own the full people management lifecycle — talent acquisition, performance management, career development, and organizational planning — while bridging operational management with enterprise-level technical strategy as Executive IT / Software Architect for IBM Cloud Platinum Enterprise.

In my architecture capacity, I drive multi-billion dollar workload migrations for IBM's Top 1% clients in Finance and Healthcare. As Chief Architect, Product Owner, and Manager for SAP ASE on IBM Cloud, I own the deployment, optimization, and scaling of mission-critical systems. My expertise spans SAP ASE, VSI on VPC, z Systems, VMware, ROKS/IKS, and I bring deep DevSecOps and AIOps specialization — leveraging tools like Mend, SonarQube, Contrast, and Twistlock to deliver secure, compliant cloud environments.

As a BCS Fellow (FBCS), Distinguished Architect (The Open Group), DZone MVB & Core member, Microsoft MVP alumni, and Intel Software Innovator, I actively share knowledge through international speaking engagements — reaching 550K+ minds across 20+ global stages — and through technical blogging on DZone, Medium, Dev.to, and my personal blog VMacWrites.

I am also a published author with Apress (Springer Science+Business Media), contributing to the body of knowledge in enterprise technology. I have a deep reverence for the theoretical foundations of computing, fueling my constant research into Mathematics, Artificial Intelligence, and Quantum Computing.

Expertise

What I Do

19+ years crafting enterprise-scale solutions across the technology stack — from cloud infrastructure to AI systems.

Artificial Intelligence

LLM architecture, generative AI security, MCP protocols, machine learning pipelines, and AI governance for enterprise systems.

Cloud Architecture

Multi-cloud strategy, Kubernetes orchestration, serverless computing, cloud security, and infrastructure-as-code at scale.

Quantum Computing

Post-quantum cryptography frameworks, quantum optimization, quantum security governance, and quantum-ready system design.

Cybersecurity

Zero-trust architecture, AI security posture management, SSL/TLS enforcement, and enterprise security frameworks.

Enterprise Architecture

TOGAF-aligned architecture strategy, solution design, technology roadmapping, and digital transformation leadership.

Technical Authorship

Apress-published author, 100+ technical articles, DZone Refcard author, Hackernoon Top Writer, and global technology speaker.
